channel.title: Hackthebox on The Antgarsil Pages
channel.description: Recent content in Hackthebox on The Antgarsil Pages

item.title: Exploiting Python Pickle
item.description: Hack the Box is a known platform containing a set of security challenges. In this instance, we will cover solving of a subsection of the retired ‘Canape’ box, consisting of a remote code execution by abusing insecure deserialization of Python Pickle. After enumerating the host, we will come across a snippet of code which will be of interest to us. Obtaining this snippet is fairly simple and I didn’t feel like writing about it, so I won’t spoil it for you entirely!
